## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Compatibility/theme-review fix
- [ ] Template, pattern, or theme.json change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `bin/package-check`
- [ ] Smoke-tested in WordPress or WordPress Playground when behavior changed
- [ ] Checked frontend output when templates, patterns, or styles changed
- [ ] Checked editor/Site Editor behavior when theme.json, templates, or patterns changed

## Constraints

- [ ] No build step added
- [ ] No theme-authored front-end JavaScript added
- [ ] No remote assets, trackers, or external fonts added
- [ ] Release-package hygiene preserved
